item.title: 27 wholesome things for your weekend
item.description:
@StonesOnTheHill - I love this <3
This was towards the end of the pandemic, IIRC. Happily, the store is still around & they made "More love, less hate" their new logo - in rainbow colors, of course! https://confectionstx.com/
This was early in the pandemic when many people did the shopping (or cooking!) for their elderly friends and neighbors.
HE'S SO HAPPY OMG --- If you can spare a few bucks or even just an upvote, I'd be at LEAST as happy as that doggo if you could check out this post by a friend in a bad situation: https://imgur.com/gallery/trying-to-avoid-homelessness-again-ep67mty <3
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @shlives did this piece not long ago. Check out their posts for some great work they've done!
27 Man Tax: Sebastian Stan
“Never be afraid to raise your voice for honesty and truth and compassion, against injustice and lying and greed.” - William Faulkner I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, thank you so much.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: From the Truth & Accountability Project
item.description: Fascists come in all shapes and sizes: They can be burly, unshaven, leather-jacketed apes beating Capitol police with flagpoles and defecating in Capitol offices, or they can be mousy little boys in suits scurrying through these same Capitol halls. The one thing that they have in common is placing their own warped ideology and personal interests ahead of the people and blindly goose-stepping to their fuehrer’s lies and deceit. --------
item.dc:creator: JackArmstrong2000

item.title: "I Shall Never Be Ashamed Of Citing A Bad Author If The Line Is Good" – Seneca

item.title: Close look at some amazing birds
item.dc:creator: bohund

item.title: CHIN-UP: Resistance isn't futile or meaningless.
item.description: Even if you fall, you inspire others to take a stand, and even more importantly is that you did the right thing. Fight and keep up the hope. Remember to be good to yourself and help those close to you. Don't let the constant negative news bring you down.
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
MrPuckett here super excited to be back for TheFreePizzaDude today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
This has been a big help for us to feed more people and we love you so much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,919 meals since we started 1,157 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1245 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 140 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th by @OP 210 9th, 10th and 11th by Pizza Angel @arandomNUN 300 12th, 13th and 14th by Pizza Angel @pirokiko 350 15th, 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 425 18th, 19th, 20th, 21st, 22nd and Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @WafflesOfMassDeliciousness 435 Kobe Bryant and 25th by Pizza Angel @ARandomNuN 442 26th, 27th, 28th, 29th and 30th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 500 31st by Pizza Angel @sesamesnapsinhalf 540 32nd, 33rd and 34th by Pizza Angel @ARandomNuN ... Today's Grocery Tally 500 1st by Grocery Angel @ezcik 510 2nd by Grocery Angel @MurphyPandorasLawBox ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 34 meals Filled 2 huge grocery orders That's 15,954 meals since we started 1,159 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
